wins: Blackwell ramp drove 73% year-on-year increase in Data Center revenue
GB200 NVL introduced with significant performance improvements
Microsoft and other hyperscalers deploying thousands of Blackwell GPUs
NVIDIA Dynamo improved AI inference throughput by 30x
AI factories accelerating with nearly 100 projects in flight
risks: H20 export controls caused $4.5 billion charge and $8 billion revenue loss in Q2
